BackstoryDef.title: corporate enforcer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] enforced the interests of a Dominion corporation in the lower districts, keeping workers compliant and dissidents quiet. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the corporations have a very precise definition of order and a very flexible definition of the means used to maintain it.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion soldier
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the Dominion's corporate military, deployed to whatever situation the corporations decided required armed resolution. [PAWN_pronoun] followed orders and learned not to ask too many questions about who gave them.

BackstoryDef.title: pit fight champion
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fought in the lower district pit circuits long enough to become someone people came specifically to watch. [PAWN_pronoun] learned everything the lower districts could teach about hurting people in enclosed spaces.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate assassin
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was employed by a Dominion corporate board to solve problems that could not be solved through negotiation or litigation. [PAWN_pronoun] was precise, reliable, and careful never to know more than the job required.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion military sergeant
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] led a unit of Dominion corporate soldiers through operations that the official records described in terms nobody who was there would have recognized. [PAWN_pronoun] kept [PAWN_possessive] people alive as often as [PAWN_pronoun] could and learned to live with the times [PAWN_pronoun] could not.

BackstoryDef.title: tower complex guard
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the private guard force of a Dominion tower complex, protecting people whose names [PAWN_pronoun] was not always told from threats [PAWN_pronoun] was not always informed about. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to stay alert and ask no questions.

BackstoryDef.title: gang warlord
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] rose to command one of the lower district gangs, holding territory through force and the credible threat of more force. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that leadership in the lower districts is measured in the willingness to go further than anyone else.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate riot suppressor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was deployed to suppress labor unrest in the Dominion's factory districts, a job that required specific skills and a specific capacity not to think too hard about the people on the other side. [PAWN_pronoun] developed both.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion border enforcer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] patrolled the boundaries between corporate territories, intercepting unauthorized movement of people and goods. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that borders in the Dominion exist to control the lower class and are largely invisible to everyone else.

BackstoryDef.title: private security specialist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a specialist in a Dominion private security firm, handling assignments that required more skill and more discretion than the standard corporate enforcers could provide. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to be thorough and to forget quickly.

BackstoryDef.title: lower district enforcer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] kept order in the lower districts on behalf of whoever was paying at the time, learning that loyalty in that world has a price and the price is always negotiable. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to negotiate it carefully.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion military scout
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a scout for the Dominion's corporate military, operating ahead of the main force in conditions that required self-reliance and the ability to make fast decisions without support. [PAWN_pronoun] developed both and came to prefer working alone.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate duelist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] fought formal duels on behalf of Dominion corporate interests, resolving disputes that the upper class preferred settled with blades rather than lawyers. [PAWN_pronoun] was undefeated and learned not to think too carefully about what that meant.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion military sniper
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a designated marksman in the Dominion's corporate military, learning to work at distance and in patience and to treat both as professional virtues. [PAWN_pronoun] was very good at the work and developed a very specific relationship with silence.

BackstoryDef.title: factory district gang veteran
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years fighting for territory in the lower districts, surviving long enough to become the kind of person that younger fighters pointed at and said nothing to. [PAWN_pronoun] learned everything the lower districts could teach about staying alive and passed on what [PAWN_pronoun] could.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate contracted killer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked under contract for a Dominion corporate security division, handling assignments that required a professional approach and a short memory. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to deliver results and ask no questions about who wanted them.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate extraction specialist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was contracted by Dominion corporations to extract assets, personnel, and occasionally information from situations that had become complicated. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a comprehensive understanding of what it takes to get people out of places they should not be.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate security contractor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a contracted security specialist for Dominion corporate interests, providing protection and enforcement services that the corporations preferred not to handle through official channels. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the difference between a contractor and an employee is mostly a matter of paperwork.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion intelligence contractor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was contracted by a Dominion corporate board to gather intelligence on competitors, dissidents, and anyone else the board considered worth watching. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that corporations know far more about their lower class workforce than the workforce knows about them.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate problem solver
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was retained by Dominion corporate interests to resolve situations that required more flexibility than the official security apparatus allowed. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to be thorough, discreet, and expensive.

BackstoryDef.title: void raider
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] operated as an independent mercenary across several sectors, taking contracts from whoever was paying and developing a self reliant approach to survival that no single employer could have taught [PAWN_objective]. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that loyalty to a contract is the only loyalty that reliably pays.

BackstoryDef.title: frontier operator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as an independent operator in the Dominion's outlying territories, taking jobs that the corporate military could not or would not handle officially. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to work alone, resupply from whatever was available, and finish what [PAWN_pronoun] started.

BackstoryDef.title: independent arms dealer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] traded weapons between factions across the sector, developing an expert understanding of what people are willing to pay for the means of violence and why. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to stay neutral and move quickly.

BackstoryDef.title: sector bounty hunter
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tracked and captured targets across multiple sectors, working independently and developing a methodical approach to finding people who did not want to be found. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that everyone leaves a trail and most people underestimate how easy it is to follow.

BackstoryDef.title: wandering blade
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] traveled between conflicts across the sector, offering [PAWN_possessive] skills to whoever needed them and moving on when the work was done. [PAWN_pronoun] accumulated a great deal of experience and very few attachments.

BackstoryDef.title: discharged dominion soldier
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served in the Dominion's corporate military until the relationship became mutual and ended. [PAWN_pronoun] took [PAWN_possessive] training and experience into the private sector and found the pay considerably better and the oversight considerably less.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion veteran turned contractor
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years in the Dominion's corporate military before taking [PAWN_possessive] skills private. [PAWN_pronoun] learned that the work is largely the same outside the uniform and the money is better without it.

BackstoryDef.title: rogue military operative
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] left the Dominion's corporate military under circumstances that the official records describe differently than [PAWN_pronoun] would. [PAWN_pronoun] applied [PAWN_possessive] considerable training to a career that the Dominion would have preferred [PAWN_pronoun] not pursue.

BackstoryDef.title: former dominion intelligence agent
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked in the Dominion's corporate intelligence division until [PAWN_pronoun] decided that [PAWN_possessive] skills were worth more on the open market. [PAWN_pronoun] was correct. [PAWN_pronoun] has been careful never to work for the same client twice.

BackstoryDef.title: disavowed special operator
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] conducted special operations for the Dominion's corporate military until the board decided that [PAWN_pronoun] knew too much to remain on the payroll and too much to be easily removed. [PAWN_pronoun] resolved the situation [PAWN_possessive] own way and left.
